name: CP/M 2.20 SoftCard BIOS (Z-80, $DA00-$DFFF)
description: Microsoft SoftCard CP/M 2.20 BIOS jump-table labels. Companion to cpm_2_2.json (standard CP/M zero-page + BDOS conventions). 2.20 places the BIOS in language-card RAM with the jump table at $DA00. These addresses are specific to the 2.20 build.

0xDA1B.name: SELDSK
0xDA1B.comment: BIOS entry 9  -- select disk (returns DPH pointer)

0xDA1E.name: SETTRK
0xDA1E.comment: BIOS entry 10 -- set track for next read/write

0xDA21.name: SETSEC
0xDA21.comment: BIOS entry 11 -- set sector for next read/write

0xDA24.name: SETDMA
0xDA24.comment: BIOS entry 12 -- set DMA buffer address

0xDA27.name: READ
0xDA27.comment: BIOS entry 13 -- read selected sector to DMA

0xDA2A.name: WRITE
0xDA2A.comment: BIOS entry 14 -- write DMA buffer to selected sector

0xDA2D.name: LISTST
0xDA2D.comment: BIOS entry 15 -- LIST status (inline XOR A; RET = not ready)

0xCC06.name: BDOS_ENTRY_220
0xCC06.comment: BDOS entry point -- planted at $0005-$0007 as JP $CC06
